name: dwbible-build
description: Reproducible SCSS build for dwbible. Compiles assets/dwbible.scss -> assets/dwbible.css with a pinned dart-sass so the committed CSS never drifts between machines. Production ships the committed .css and needs NO node/sass; this build runs only on the authoring machine / CI. Verify reproducibility: `npm ci && npm run build:css && git diff --exit-code assets/dwbible.css`.
